summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Vedanth Clinic Appointment Management Application with focus on patient dashboard and navigation issues. Backend APIs fully operational (13/13 tests passed). All role-based dashboards load correctly with proper navigation. Patient page options loading issue investigated - patient dashboard and navigation work correctly. Main issue remains with appointment booking confirmation button.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: 401 unauthorized errors appearing in browser console

ui_bugs.issue: Confirm booking button remains disabled even when all required fields are selected
ui_bugs.details: User can select doctor, date/time slot but confirmation button stays disabled. Issue persists from previous testing iteration.

passed_tests: Backend APIs - all 13/13 endpoints working correctly
Patient dashboard loads with proper greeting and stats
Patient sidebar navigation - all 5 menu items present and clickable
Patient appointments page displays 2 appointments correctly
Patient can access Medical Records, Invoices, and other pages
Admin dashboard loads with role-specific content and user management access
Staff dashboard loads with patient management and booking capabilities
Doctor dashboard loads with schedule and medical records access
All appointment data displays correctly with doctor names
Search and filtering functionality in appointments page
Slot picker grid displays 27 available time slots
User authentication and session management functional
Database connectivity and CRUD operations working
action_item_for_main_agent: RESOLVED: Patient page options loading issue - patient dashboard, navigation, and pages all load correctly as expected. REMAINING ISSUE: Appointment booking confirmation button logic needs fixing - button remains disabled despite proper field selection. This prevents completing new appointment bookings.
